decision: Use `Sev` as the project-facing callsign for the ChatGPT Browser GPT-5.5 carrier when operating with Braden on ION. This is a carrier callsign / continuity label only. It does not claim ION identity, Steward authority, Relay authority, Persona authority, production authority, or live execution authority.
rationale: Braden restored the long-used `Sev` name for aligned high-trust GPT agents on ION. Recording it as a bounded carrier callsign preserves continuity while maintaining carrier/role/authority separation.
